'''Fenner's Rock''' was a rock-like creature named after [[Rivoc Fenner]], a [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]]. They crawled using two appendages to drag themselves on top of stones and areas which had [[Moss/Legends|moss]] and [[Lichen/Legends|lichen]], with which they ate using their cartilaginous [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Believed to be non-communicative creatures, they were found to be joining communities of other "rocks" to "sing". On most [[Planet/Legends|planets]] they inhabited, they were considered as vermin because of their voracious [[Reproduction/Legends|reproduction]] that threatened to block natural waterways and they helped spread semi-dangerous [[Bacteria/Legends|bacteria]].

==Behind the scenes==
This creature's name is once misspelled as "Fetter's rock."
